narrative:
Precinct Chillicothe 6-B (precinct in Ross County) has 402 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.7 percentage points.
